attributes.title: O que faz
attributes.visState:
{"title":"O que faz","type":"markdown","aggs":[],"params":{"fontSize":12,"openLinksInNewTab":false,"markdown":"The following MikroTik events are currently covered by decoders in this repository:
Authentication & User Activity

    Successful user login
    Failed login attempts
    User logout events
    VPN login, logout, and authentication failures
    VPN user add (ppp secret)
    User password changes
    User add/change operations

System & Configuration Changes

    System identity changes
    System time changes
    System timezone changes
    IP service configuration changes
    DNS configuration changes

Firewall Changes

    IPv4 filter rule add/change
    IPv4 filter rule removal
    IPv6 filter rule add/change
    IPv6 filter rule removal

Script Activity

    Script creation
    Scheduled script creation

Thx to https://github.com/xArshh/Wazuh-MikroTik-Integration"}}
